        "contents": "export default function LibraryPage() {\nconst getTypeColor = \n\n      default:\n        return 'default';\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;PageShell intensity=\"medium\"&gt;\n      &lt;PageContent&gt;\n          {/* Header */}\n          &lt;div\n            style={{\n              display: 'flex',\n              flexDirection: 'column',\n              gap: spacing.md,\n              marginBottom: spacing.xl,\n            }}\n          &gt;\n            &lt;div&gt;\n              &lt;Typography variant=\"h1\" style={{ marginBottom: spacing.xs, color: colors.text.primary }}&gt;\n                Your Library\n              &lt;/Typography&gt;\n              &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={{ color: colors.text.secondary }}&gt;\n                All your rituals and affirmations in one place\n              &lt;/Typography&gt;\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n\n            &lt;div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: spacing.md }}&gt;\n              &lt;Link href=\"/create\" style={{ textDecoration: 'none' }}&gt;\n                &lt;Button variant=\"primary\" size=\"md\" style={{ background: colors.gradients.primary }}&gt;\n                  Create New\n                &lt;/Button&gt;\n              &lt;/Link&gt;\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n\n          {/* Filters */}\n          &lt;div\n            style={{\n              display: 'flex',\n              flexDirection: 'column',\n              gap: spacing.md,\n              marginBottom: spacing.xl,\n            }}\n          &gt;\n            &lt;div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: spacing.sm, flexWrap: 'wrap' }}&gt;\n              {/* All - More opaque, darker */}\n              &lt;button\n                onClick={() =&gt; setContentType('all')}\n                style={{\n                  padding: &#96;${spacing.xs} ${spacing.md}&#96;,\n                  borderRadius: borderRadius.full,\n                  border: &#96;1px solid ${contentType === 'all' ? colors.accent.primary : colors.glass.border}&#96;,\n                  background: contentType === 'all' \n                    ? colors.gradients.primary \n                    : colors.glass.opaque, // More opaque\n                  backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',\n                  WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',\n                  color: contentType === 'all' ? colors.text.onDark : colors.text.primary\n}",

Created a full codebase analysis at **`docs/04-reference/08-full-codebase-analysis.md`**. Summary:

---

## Full Codebase Analysis – Summary

### Duplicates & Lines to Reduce

| Issue | Location | Est. savings |
|-------|----------|--------------|
| **getTypeIcon / getTypeColor** | ContentListPage, Library, Marketplace | ~40 lines |
| **Sanctuary create layouts** | 3× identical layouts (affirmations, meditations, rituals) | ~45 lines |
| **MenuItem / QuickAction** | Home, Sanctuary, Profile | ~60 lines |
| **ContentItem** | Library defines local interface instead of shared | ~10 lines |
| **Route data** | Pages vs Sitemap use different structures | ~50 lines |
| **Scripts Supabase** | 9 scripts each create their own client | ~30 lines |

**Total**: ~235–300 lines reducible + fewer duplicate sources of truth.

---

### Functions to Improve

- **Error handling**: Use `normalizeAuthError` consistently across auth flows.
- **Form patterns**: Extract shared `AuthFormWrapper` for login/signup (~80 lines saved).
- **TypeScript**: Remove `as any` in Library’s `getTypeColor` usage.
- **Loading / empty states**: Add where missing in Library, Marketplace, Create, Profile.

---

### Best Practice Alignment (from .cursorrules)

- Types in shared – Library’s `ContentItem` should use shared type.
- Utility functions – `getTypeIcon`, `getTypeColor` should live in shared.
- No duplicate components – consolidate the 3 create layouts into one.

---

### Legacy / Stale Structure

- **`waqup-new/waqup-new/`**: Likely legacy or duplicate; contains older theme files we consolidated into `@waqup/shared/theme`.
- **Root `app/`**: Possible duplicate Next.js structure; web app is under `packages/web/`. Confirm if still used.

---

### Recommended Priority Order

1. **High**: Content type helpers to shared; ContentCreateLayout consolidation; Library uses shared ContentItem.
2. **Medium**: Menu/QuickAction config shared; route data SSOT; shared Supabase helper for scripts.
3. **Lower**: Auth form extraction; loading/empty state audit; legacy folder cleanup.

---

The analysis doc uses Context7 references: `.cursorrules`, `docs/02-mobile/03-implementation.md`, `docs/03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md`, `docs/04-reference/07-design-system-cross-platform.md`, and `docs/04-reference/04-pages-and-themes-reference.md`.

All requested analysis items are implemented. Summary:

## Completed changes

### 1. Content type helpers (shared)
- **`@waqup/shared/utils/content-helpers.ts`**: `getContentTypeBadgeVariant()`
- **`packages/web/src/lib/content-helpers.ts`**: `getContentTypeIcon()`
- **`ContentListPage`**, **Library**, **Marketplace**: use shared helpers, duplicate `getTypeIcon` / `getTypeColor` logic removed

### 2. ContentItem shared type
- **`@waqup/shared/types/content.ts`**: `ContentItem` and `ContentItemType` defined
- **`packages/web/src/components/content/ContentItem.ts`**: re-exports from shared
- **Library page**: imports `ContentItem` from shared instead of defining its own

### 3. Sanctuary create layouts consolidated
- **`ContentCreateLayout`**: shared component with `contentType` prop
- **Affirmations/Meditations/Rituals create layouts**: reduced to thin wrappers that pass `contentType`

### 4. MenuItem / QuickAction shared config
- **`packages/web/src/lib/navigation.ts`**: `HOME_QUICK_ACTIONS`, `SANCTUARY_QUICK_ACTIONS`, `SANCTUARY_MENU_ITEMS`, `PROFILE_MENU_ITEMS`
- **Home**, **Sanctuary**, **Profile**: use shared navigation config

### 5. Route data single source of truth
- **`packages/web/src/lib/routes.ts`**: `APP_ROUTES` plus `routesBySection()`, `getRouteGroupsForPages()`, `pathToHref()`
- **Pages index** and **Sitemap**: both read from this canonical source

### 6. Skipped (waqu-app removed)
- **Scripts Supabase util**: Supabase scripts removed with waqu-app, so no changes made

### 7. Deferred
- **Auth form extraction**: left for later; login/signup still inline

`npm run type-check` passes. Analysis doc updated at `docs/04-reference/08-full-codebase-analysis.md` with the implementation status.

_**User**_

where is this? inside our folder?

@waqup/shared/utils/content-helpers.ts

---

_**Agent (model composer-1.5, mode Agent)**_


That path refers to the shared package inside your monorepo.

`@waqup/shared` maps to `packages/shared/`, so:

- `@waqup/shared/utils` → `packages/shared/src/utils/`
- `@waqup/shared/utils/content-helpers` → **`packages/shared/src/utils/content-helpers.ts`**

So the file lives at:

```
waqup-new/
└── packages/
    └── shared/
        └── src/
            └── utils/
                └── content-helpers.ts
```
